task_description: Add ~90 new voice line bark events across combat taunts, victory, loot/container, exploration, and tavern idle categories. Wire them into gameplay trigger points in CombatEngine, SliceScreen, and idle bark pools. Focus on lines that can actually trigger in the current slice gameplay.

verification.summary: All tests pass including 4 new CombatEngineTest tests verifying expanded taunt/victory pools, enemy-nearly-dead bark, and weak-attack mockery. 759 lines added across 10 files. Post-review fixes applied: removed treasure bark overwrite in boss victory handler (SliceScreen), narrowed tauntsFor/victoriesFor from public to internal (CombatEngine).
